businessBackground: M.S. International plc is a UK-listed (AIM) niche industrial group with four operating segments, dominated by Defence and Security (70% of FY2025 turnover). Defence revenue is sourced primarily from naval gun systems supplied to NATO navies (UK Royal Navy core; first deliveries to USA & German Navy in FY25) and VSHORAD (Very Short-Range Air Defence) land-based counter-drone weapons systems supplied to Middle East customers.
